reason: The image depicts a modern office setting. The presence of modern computers with graphical displays, contemporary office furniture (chairs, desks), and modern ceiling lights, along with the clothing styles worn by the individuals are all indicators of a time period later than what is required for the Cambridge Analytica event in 2018.
